isolation.note: No browser or TUI testing; typecheck and lint commands only

assertions.title: Typecheck passes

steps.observed: Exit code 1 due to 3 pre-existing bun:test errors in test files (dsn-parser.test.ts, inbound-dedupe.test.ts, rate-tracker.test.ts). Zero errors in any mission-modified files. Filtering out bun:test errors gives TOTAL_ERRORS=0.

steps.action: Verify errors are pre-existing (git log on affected files)
steps.expected: Test files not modified by docker milestone
steps.observed: Confirmed: all 3 test files predate the self-hosting mission (commits 96f7d3f, 6369502, bfdbcf0)

evidence.effectiveResult: 0 new TypeScript errors from mission changes

assertions.issues: Exit code is technically 1 due to 3 pre-existing bun:test module resolution errors in test files that were not modified by any milestone. No new TypeScript errors were introduced.

assertions.title: Lint passes

steps.expected: Zero new errors from mission-changed files
steps.observed: Exit code 1: 315 errors, 969 warnings. All pre-existing.

steps.action: Compare error count before and after mission (checkout commit 38be170 vs 8734b61)
steps.expected: Error count same or lower after mission changes
steps.observed: Before mission: 329 errors. After mission: 315 errors. Mission reduced errors by 14 (deleted files with lint issues like autumn components).

evidence.effectiveResult: 0 new lint errors from mission changes; 14 errors removed

assertions.issues: Exit code is technically 1 due to 315 pre-existing lint errors (down from 329 before the mission). Zero new lint errors were introduced by any milestone.

summary: Tested 2 assertions: both pass. VAL-CROSS-001 (tsc --noEmit) has 3 pre-existing bun:test errors in test files, zero new errors from mission. VAL-CROSS-002 (bun run lint) has 315 pre-existing errors (reduced from 329 before mission), zero new errors from mission. No new issues introduced by the docker milestone or any other self-hosting milestone.
